00028 
00029 /*
00030  *  WINDOMDEBUG   : write trace in a log file.
00031  */
00032 
00033 /* #define WINDOMDEBUG */
00034 
00035 /* size of the array __iconlist */
00036 
00037 #define MAX_ICON    100
00038 
00039 /* buffer size */
00040 #define FILE_SIZE   255     /* filenames */
00041 #define LINE_SIZE   150     /* line len for fget() */
00042 #define PIPE_SIZE   256     /* global memory for data exchange between applications */
00043 
00044 /* Memory Protection Friendly
00045  * comment this if you don't care about memory protection, and accept that
00046  * your application jump to memory it doesn't own (icfs cookie design for instance)
00047  */
00048 #define MP_FRIENDLY 1
